name: Weisse Bohnensuppe (White Bean Soup)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Celery and Tops; Finely Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the beans with water in a large pot or soup kettle and soak overnight.
2. Rinse the beans well and return them to the pot with the ham bone and 3 quarts of water.
3. Simmer, uncovered, for 2 hours.
4. Add parsley, onions, garlic, celery, tops, salt, and pepper. Simmer, uncovered, for 1 hour or until vegetables are tender.
5. Remove the ham bone, dice the meat, and add it to the soup. Serve hot.
